category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a markup-based typesetting system; official docs describe Typst as a markup-based typesetting system for the sciences.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is typst; official documentation and site brand use Typst.
docs_sources: Official Typst docs are at typst.app/docs and contain tutorial and reference documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is intentionally not reassessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies markup-based typesetting; official docs describe tutorial and reference material for Typst concepts and features; source_facts.executables lists typst.
